build.buildCommand: composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && sed 's/APP_NAME=E_Commerce_Store/APP_NAME="E_Commerce_Store"/g' .env.example > .env

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
